title: senecio mitonis
intro: Senecio mitonis, also known as the Giant Ragwort or Jacobaea maritima, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. Senecio mitonis can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
